items.name: Chaos Greatsword of the Void
items.description:
Embrace the power of the eternal chaos. This corrupted blade is forged from void-shards and bound by the souls of the chaotic realm. Featuring the unblinking Eye of Chaos and obsidian horns, this sword doesn't just strike—it unravels reality itself. Destiny is yours to break.

"Chaos is the only true freedom."
